_comment: Cameras the detector runs YOLO on. lat/lng/heading_deg/fov_deg MUST match src/data/mockCameras.ts. hls_url values come from src/data/realCameraStreams.ts. Detection depth is projected along detector/road_<id>.json when present. travel_bearing_deg is the actual traffic direction used for map arrows. ITICM_BMAMI0080 looks inland/east down ถนนสาทรใต้ at oncoming westbound traffic; DOH-PER-4-016 looks WNW down ถนนแจ้งวัฒนะ (HW304) at receding traffic bound for แยกปากเกร็ด. `lanes` describes the carriageway the ROI covers; lateral position is mapped across `count * lane_width_m` meters centered on the road corridor (+`centerline_offset_m`), and `invert` flips image left/right relative to the corridor's perpendicular. `cache_relay` cameras are re-segmented by a local ffmpeg relay into ~2s HLS with PROGRAM-DATE-TIME under detector/cache/<id>/ (served at /cache/<id>/index.m3u8); both YOLO and the frontend video consume this local stream so boxes and video share one timeline, and the overlay auto-syncs via hls.js playingDate. `cache_relay` cameras are processed by a segment-file reader that parses the local playlist's PROGRAM-DATE-TIME and runs YOLO on each segment exactly target_latency_s after it was broadcast, publishing content_ts for the overlay's playingDate sync; the frontend plays the cached stream at the same latency (liveSyncDuration 18 in CameraFeedPanel). `stale_after_s` is the per-camera client-side window (src/services/detectionFeed.ts) after which a camera's detections are dropped as stale. Hyperbolic depth cameras (`depth_model: "hyperbolic"`) map foot-y to ground distance via near_m + depth_scale_m*(1/(y-horizon_y) - 1/(1-horizon_y)), calibrated from constant-speed car tracks; linear mapping remains the default.

cameras._comment: แยกใต้ทางด่วนพระราม 4 (Rama IV / expressway junction). SIDE-VIEW camera (view: side): mounted high on the south side of RAMA IV RD looking ~north, so Rama IV (5 WNW-bound lanes near + 4 ESE-bound lanes far) crosses the frame broadside. The elevated Chaloem Mahanakhon Expressway is ~70 m west and NOT the road in view; the street receding in the background is Duang Phithak Rd, cut off by the ROI top. road_ITICM_BMAMI0072.json follows the WNW-bound carriageway shifted 9 m into the median (scripts/gen-detector-road.mjs, backLenM/lateralOffsetM); corridor direction = lane-0 travel (293 deg). invert_span: image LEFT is ~west = corridor-forward. Lane 0 = bottom of ROI = near/south carriageway = WNW-bound; lanes >= oncoming_from travel ESE (113 deg). lanes.invert: lane 0 sits on the corridor perpendicular's negative (SSW) side.
